overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player walking through a storm-ravaged modern city with a massive tornado visible in the distance. The player moves from an urban street past digital billboards, through a plaza with spherical sculptures, and along a waterfront promenade with fountains while carrying a sniper rifle.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with digital advertising and crosswalk

events.description: passing behind hedge row that temporarily obscures view of digital billboard
entering open plaza area with spherical sculptures visible ahead

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along wet pavement past urban landscaping with sniper rifle at ready

entered.detail: tall vertical digital display showing smartphone advertisement with colorful graphics
modern high-rise office buildings with reflective glass facades
massive tornado funnel visible in the distance between city buildings
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The player begins walking along a wet urban sidewalk next to modern glass skyscrapers. A large digital billboard stands on the left while a massive tornado looms in the distant center. The camera passes behind hedges and approaches a plaza area with spherical sculptures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with sculptures overlooking waterfront

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the storm clouds and tornado against the building facade
lightning strike illuminates the tornado and storm clouds overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while observing the massive tornado and storm overhead

entered.detail: large spherical stone sculpture sitting on the plaza pavement
concrete seating arranged along the walkway
open view of water body visible between trees on the right side

segments.scene_description: The player enters an open plaza featuring spherical sculptures and park benches. The camera tilts upward to reveal the dramatic storm sky with a massive tornado funnel. A lightning strike flashes across the sky, illuminating the swirling clouds above the glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade path with street lighting

events.description: approaching waterfront area with water fountains becoming visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the waterfront path with weapon ready, moving toward the tornado

entered.detail: contemporary curved street light pole with single fixture
multiple water jets spraying upward from the waterfront surface
calm water surface reflecting the stormy sky and buildings

segments.scene_description: The player moves along a waterfront promenade with modern street lamps lining the path. Water fountains become visible in the distance across the reflecting pool. The tornado appears closer as the player advances along the open walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza with water fountains and reflecting pools

events.description: entering area with active water fountains spraying on both sides of the walkway

agents.ego_description: moving along the reflective water pools toward the massive tornado vortex ahead

entered.detail: low modern building with curved roofline visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a wide waterfront plaza surrounded by reflecting pools and active water fountains. The camera moves between water features with the massive tornado dominating the center of the view. The storm appears closer as the player advances along the wet pavement toward the vortex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow urban corridor into a wide, exposed waterfront plaza as a massive tornado looms closer. It begins on a wet sidewalk flanked by glass skyscrapers and a digital billboard, moving past manicured hedges toward an open plaza. As the camera enters the plaza, it tilts upward to reveal a dramatic storm sky where a flash of lightning illuminates the swirling clouds and the distant funnel. The scene then shifts toward a waterfront promenade lined with modern street lamps, passing reflecting pools and distant fountains while the tornado grows more imposing in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera advances across the wet pavement of a wide waterfront plaza, weaving between active water features as the vortex dominates the horizon.
